current.headline: How De la Fuente's Spain are closing in on greatness
current.summary: Before Spain's World Cup quarter-final against Belgium, Guillem Balague talks to Spain boss Luis de la Fuente about their identity and Lamine Yamal.

items.headline: 'What old timers can do' - the evolution of Belgium's golden generation
items.summary: BBC Sport explores what is behind Belgium's progress to the last eight of the World Cup, and whether they were too easily discounted among the contenders.

items.headline: Courtois: Two-on-One Is Belgium’s Best Hope Against Yamal
items.summary: Thibaut Courtois says numerical superiority is Belgium's most realistic tactic to contain Lamine Yamal in Friday's World Cup quarterfinal against Spain. The post Courtois: Two-on-One Is Belgium’s Best Hope Again...
